programme.title: Card Sharks
programme.desc: This show from legendary Mark Goodson-Bill Todman Productions features two contestants trying to predict answers to survey questions for the opportunity to play a game with oversized playing cards for a chance to win cash. One contestant guesses how many people (out of 100) gave a certain answer to a question and the other contestant then guesses if the number is higher or lower than the opponent's guess. The winning contestant then faces a row of cards and must determine if each succeeding card is higher or lower than the one that precedes it. The contestant who wins two out of three games wins the match and plays the bonus round, called Money Cards. The Money Cards round is similar to the card game in the main game but with three levels of cards instead of one row. The contestant is given $200 at the beginning of Money Cards and wagers any or all of that money when guessing if the cards will be higher or lower than the previous one. A perfect round could earn the contestant $28,800.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: In this original version of iconic game show "Family Feud," actor Richard Dawson plays host to two teams, each comprised of five family members, who try to match the answers given to survey questions asked to groups of people (typically 100 people in the group). The family that wins the game by being the first to reach a certain point total, either 200 or 300 depending on the rules at the time, advances to the bonus round, called Fast Money, for a chance to win thousands of dollars by answering more survey questions.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. North

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. North

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Drysdale suggests buying good stock, Jed quickly buys some cows, pigs and chickens.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The homesick Clampetts, unaware that it's Halloween, decide to go calling on their Beverly Hills neighbors.

programme.title: Medic
programme.desc: An operation may restore a musician's hearing loss.

programme.title: Medic
programme.desc: A young and healthy woman is diagnosed with breast cancer a week before her wedding; Surgery must be performed as soon as possible so she becomes depressed and contemplates suicide.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: Matt and Frankie go to Kansas City to aid in the capture of outlaw brothers Frank and Jesse James.

programme.title: The Battle of Russia
programme.desc: Legendary Hollywood director Frank Capra oversaw this wartime documentary effort, which stitches together newsreel and archival film to explore relations between Russia and the United States. The film also recounts Russia's military history through the use of stock footage and clips from Sergei Eisenstein's "Alexander Nevsky." Particular attention is paid to the Battle of Stalingrad, during which Soviet forces fended off Nazi troops attempting to seize control of the Russian city.

programme.title: Way Down East
programme.desc: An unwed mother (Lillian Gish) is abandoned, then banished in a blizzard and set adrift on ice floes.

programme.title: Headline Crasher
programme.desc: Two journalists (Frankie Darro, Kane Richmond) investigate a senator (Richard Tucker) while he campaigns for re-election.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tartu
programme.desc: Captain Terence Stevenson with the British Army is part of the bomb disposal unit in London.

programme.title: City of Missing Girls
programme.desc: The death of a young woman leads a reporter (Astrid Allwyn) to an art school where several other students have met similar fates.

programme.title: Of Human Bondage
programme.desc: Based on a novel by W. Somerset Maugham, this drama follows Philip Carey (Leslie Howard), an English medical student who abandons his artistic aspirations when he falls for Mildred Rogers (Bette Davis), a callous and manipulative waitress. Despite Mildred's abuse, Philip becomes completely obsessed with her as she walks into and out of his life. Whenever it seems that Philip is ready to move on, Mildred reappears, in a seemingly inescapable vicious cycle.

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leeches
programme.desc: A bartender sends his wife (Yvette Vickers) and her lover (Michael Emmet) into a swamp where large smart leeches lurk.

programme.title: The Devil's Partner
programme.desc: An old hermit (Ed Nelson) who lived outside of dusty Furnace Flats, N.M., dies, and his nephew, Nick (also Nelson), arrives in town. Everyone likes Nick at first, especially pretty Nell Lucas (Jean Allison), who used to deliver milk to his uncle. But strange things start happening in town: A man dies of poisoned goat milk; Nell's fianc, David (Richard Crane), is horribly mauled by a dog; and the town drunk winds up dead. Everyone has reason to suspect Nick because he is a warlock.

programme.title: The Curse of Bigfoot
programme.desc: While a class is discussing what is known and what should remain unknown, a high school teacher named Roger Mason (Bob Clymire) tells the students a horrifying story from his youth. Mason recounts how, many years earlier, he went into the forest with some students. While there, they not only discovered Native American artifacts, but they somehow also stumbled onto a mummified body. Inevitably, the mummy, which was really a monster, came alive and proceeded to terrorize the area.

programme.title: The Amazing Transparent Man
programme.desc: A crook (Douglas Kennedy) decides to rob a bank instead of working for the mad scientist who made him invisible.

programme.title: The Mickey Rooney Show
programme.desc: Mickey learns that his girlfriend Pat is flirting with an actor on the set of a western, so he and Joey head on out as a couple of cowpokes.

programme.title: The Mickey Rooney Show

programme.title: The Lucy Show

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard
programme.desc: Colonel March is called in to investigate when there is a murder in a beauty salon. There are plenty of suspects and it's up to him to single out the murderer.

programme.title: Yancy Derringer
programme.desc: An Army officer with vengeance in his heart tries to stop a presidential pardon. Without the pardon, a man is scheduled to die before a firing squad, leaving it up to Yancy to recover this pardon.

programme.title: Decoy
programme.desc: Casey must solve a murder case off of a slim lead. All signs point to Maxie, but Casey has her suspicions after visiting the insurance company who filed the victim's claim and retracing his steps.

programme.title: Fungus the Bogeyman: The Miniseries
programme.desc: Mould and Jessica become friends. But Jessica, with the unwitting assistance of Mould, manages to escape back home. Now Fungus and Mildew must create a plan for damage control.

programme.title: Spike Team
programme.desc: Coach Lucky has recruited athletes, but they need to learn to train as a team. Madame Amalia has paid for the best players, best coaches, best equipment and she expects the best.

programme.title: Weirdsister College
programme.desc: Ethel is enamored with Professor Starfinder & when she's selected to be his new research assistant, she lords it over Mildred! She is soon shocked, however when Milly is hired as well!

programme.title: Grand Star
programme.desc: There is turmoil in Grand Star when Palidor decides to evacuate the station and use a lottery to select those who get to leave for the safety of the new station.

programme.title: 15/Love
programme.desc: Adena, Tanis & Cameron are all trying to adjust to the ways of Cascadia without Squib & Cody. Little do they know the two are on the way to return & their new relationship may be coming to an end.

programme.title: Harts of the West
programme.desc: Lingerie salesman Dave Hart decides to try and make his lifelong dream of being a cowboy come true. He makes a deposit on a dude ranch, but finds out that things aren't quite as they seem.

programme.title: Race to Mars
programme.desc: It's a moral quandary: do the astronauts accept possible death from this undiagnosed disease or face a possible lifetime of quarantine on Earth if they are contagious?

programme.title: The Trials of Rosie O'Neill
programme.desc: Rosie finds herself defending a charming & legendary Blues legend Fish Fry Baby (Bill Cobbs)! Fish Fry is on trial for kidnapping a musician who stole his song & made millions with it.

programme.title: Gone in a Heartbeat
programme.desc: Two high school boys kidnap Jan and demand a ransom from Mark, her husband. Mark must play a game of cat and mouse to secure his wife's release, and both boys realize they're in over their heads.

programme.title: Passion and Paradise
programme.desc: Tycoon Sir Harry Oakes is enraged to learn that his daughter is to be married to a sex worker, Alfred De Marigny. Before he can curb the marriage plans, however, he turns up brutally murdered.

programme.title: A Woman of Independent Means
programme.desc: Frustrated with her marriage, Bess accompanies her children on a Queen Mary cruise, where she experiences romance with an older man. After her father's death, Bess and Sam reconcile.

programme.title: Regina
programme.desc: When a son returns to his family's home with his unexpected new fianc?e, his mother struggles to accept an additional dinner guest, let alone a future daughter in law.

programme.title: Be Here Nowish
programme.desc: After a night out, Sam awakes late for work to find Nina cuddling her very tightly. When she leaves, two of Nina's spiritually enlightened friends bring over chocolate chip and cannabis cookies.

programme.title: Flying Lessons
programme.desc: With her life at a crossroads, Sophie Conway returns home to the small town she always wanted to forget. After she arrives, Sophie is faced with the friends and lovers she left behind.

programme.title: Tropical Heat
programme.desc: An eyewitness falls for Nick when he stops an armed robbery at a store. She decides to help him identify the robber she saw fleeing from the scene. The problem? She might be seeing things.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Malone and Veronica must defend the treehouse from mercenaries. After being ambushed by Norse warriors, Roxton must take the life of another in order to rise from the dead and save Marguerite.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: A murder becomes personal when Mike Hammer is scheduled to go on a date, but his flame is killed before he even arrives to her apartment. He must follow the breadcrumbs to track down the killer.

programme.title: Peter Gunn
programme.desc: An aging mob boss has been recently released from prison, and Peter Gunn is hired to find out who wants him dead. The mob boss's reason for wanting to know is more than it would seem.

programme.title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
programme.desc: Little John is captured by the Sheriff's men, and the Sheriff decides quickly to hang him as an example. Unfortunately, the Sheriff cannot find anyone willing to be the hangman.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sir Lancelot
programme.desc: King Arthur banishes Lancelot from the kingdom because he believes he made a false accusation against King Marhaus. Outside the kingdom, however, Lancelot runs into Marhaus and uncovers an evil plot.

programme.title: The Buccaneers
programme.desc: The authorities are trying to drum up more business for the colony. However, the first merchantmen to arrive has a crew member killed with a warning: beware the mark of the Hawk.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: The Open
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro takes viewers through the market-moving events from around the world during the most important hour of the trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Americas
programme.desc: In an effort to provide extensive coverage of worldwide financial markets, Bloomberg features several regional shows under the "Bloomberg Markets" banner, with each focusing on that geographic area's markets. This American-focused version reports on the latest business news and features interviews with political and business leaders to help investors make investment decisions that build their portfolios.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: European Close
programme.desc: Thanks to the time difference between the locations, the financial markets in Europe close when the American markets are still in full swing. Bloomberg covers the end of the European trading day with this half-hour show -- which airs in the morning U.S. time -- during the network's "Bloomberg Markets" daytime programming block. The show is hosted by two anchors on separate continents -- Betty Liu in Bloomberg's New York studio and Mark Barton in London -- who discuss the stories that impacted the European markets that day. The show also features sound bites from some of the day's biggest news.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: The most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: The Close
programme.desc: The final minutes and seconds before the closing bell on Wall Street with the latest news, data and expert analysis.

programme.title: Bloomberg Triple Take
programme.desc: Hosts Caroline Hyde, Romaine Bostick and Taylor Riggs take one issue affecting global markets and the economy and split it into three angles.

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Australia
programme.desc: Bloomberg continues the expansion of its "Daybreak" franchise with this version that includes reporting from New York and Sydney, Australia. "Daybreak: Australia" delivers news from the Australian market as well as developments from around the world that matter to decision-makers in the finance industry. This installment of "Daybreak" joins other geographically focused versions of the show that highlight financial news in other regions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Asia
programme.desc: With Asia being about half a day ahead of America, when people are getting ready to settle in for the night in the U.S. the day is just starting in places like China and Japan that are important to the global economy. Featuring anchors in both New York and Hong Kong, "Bloomberg Daybreak Asia" features business and financial guests, in addition to providing insights into news and movements in global markets. This installment of "Daybreak" joins other geographically focused versions of the show that highlight financial news in other regions.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: With Chris Nassetta, the president and CEO of Hilton.

programme.title: Bloomberg Chief Future Officer
programme.desc: Sachin Mehra, chief financial officer of Mastercard.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Asia
programme.desc: In an effort to provide extensive coverage of worldwide financial markets, Bloomberg features several regional shows under the "Bloomberg Markets" banner, with each focusing on that geographic area's markets. This Asian-focused version is hosted by Shery Ahn, David Ingles, Haidi Lun, Rishaad Salamat and Angie Lau. They report the latest business news and speak with the likes of political and business leaders to help investors make investment decisions that build their portfolios.

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology

Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: European Open
programme.desc: Thanks to the time difference between the locations, the financial markets in Europe open when most Americans are sleeping. Bloomberg covers the start of the European trading day with this show -- which airs in the early morning hours in the Eastern time zone -- as part of the network's programming block dedicated to covering financial activity overseas. The show, broadcast from London, features discussions of the stories that are expected to impact the European markets that day and, subsequently, other markets around the world.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.desc: When Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with a judge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman and her daughter didn't return home from shopping, her husband directed police to a nearby mall. The child's body was found, but there was no sign of the wife.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: Plus, a woman searches for a friend who inspired her throughout all her hardships. Also, an update on the story of a self-made millionaire who was searching for his heir.

programme.desc: Chef Ramsay makes the trek to Carlstadt, NJ to visit Grasshopper, an eatery that has seen better days.

programme.title: Pranks After Dark

programme.title: Pranks After Dark
programme.desc: Even though summer is officially over, that's not stopping The Royal Stampede from showing off their intense sunburns. Plus we've got Public Prank actually getting seasonal with a hilarious Oktoberfest video.

programme.title: Pranks After Dark
programme.desc: Freddy Fairhair doesn't need a reason to give a pretty lady a rose...except to make a hilarious prank video. Also, in this episode we've got Joseph Costello offering up a pizza nobody asked for and AverageBroTV giving surprise hugs.

programme.title: Pranks After Dark

programme.title: Uncut with Jay Cutler
programme.desc: Jay Cutler sits down with sports personality and media sensation Pat McAfee, and immediately dive into the benefits of coffee and learning how to lose weight, as Pat jokes that even though he played soccer most of his youth he has gained back a lot of weight since his pro career ended. Plus Pat and Jay talk about their workout routines and how to manage dealing with guys who want to compete at the gym at their age. And Pat also talks about how playing soccer took up so much of his time in high school that he would just show up the Friday before football games with little or no practice and somehow kick it a country mile. Pat also tells the EPIC story about borrowing $100, gambling in an illegal poker game and turning it into enough money to go to Miami for kicking tryouts for college. Jay and Pat also talk about how to keep their kids grounded in a world of wild success (even though Pat hasn't had any kids yet) and Pat talks about how he got "around" going to the combine and got his offers from his pro day. And when Pat got drafted as a punter he had to quickly learn how to punt at a pro level, as he was always a kicker. And of course Pat's run with Barstool, his short lived stand up career, and how he grew his own brand online.

programme.title: Kicking It with The Koves
programme.desc: Marty, Rachel & Jesse take time to catch up with one another, & debrief on their recent travels, the last few months, and all things Cobra Kai. They talk about the recent Cobra Kai panel at Comicon they attended, and how they loved seeing the impact that the show has had on such a wide ranging group of fans. They discuss the conference at length, & get into why they found the event to be such a unique experience. Marty talks about debuting the trailer for Season 5 of Cobra Kai at Netflix is a Joke. Don't miss this conversation, only on Kicking it with the Koves!

programme.title: The Adam Carolla Show
programme.desc: Influencer and model, Harry Jowsey, comes in the studio following his recent wipeout on Netflixs Floor is Lava. He talks about filming Too Hot to Handle during COVID and how he cried when he heard the rules of the show. The gang taps into Harrys dating advice experience by having listeners call in for help with their relationships. Gina Grad reports the news of today including: Mo'Nique settling a discrimination suit against Netflix, Tom Hanks telling fans to back off, a juror explaining why they didnt believe Amber Heard, Margot Robbie & Ryan Gosling in the upcoming Barbie movie, and the Squid Game reality series.

programme.title: Uncut with Jay Cutler
programme.desc: Jay sits down with celebrity dog trainer and social media sensation Brandon McMillan, and they dive into how Brandon got his start working with animals, his father's history training exotic animals, and how he turned that skill into a career helping people who need service dogs. Brandon talks about his techniques, the most common challenges he faces, and how his success rate for turning shelter dogs into service dogs pales in comparison to his adoption rate for dogs he helps. Plus Brandon gets into the most common issue he faces which is online dog training schools, who teach book techniques without field training, who then attack him for his "outdated" methods that he contends are still the best ways to train a dog. Jay also asks about how to deal with aggression, separation anxiety, and how he got his system on MasterClass for people to learn his approach.

programme.title: TRP
programme.desc:
This week, renown fitness entrepreneur, motivational speaker and best selling author Bedros Keuilian joins the podcast. Bedros details his experience as Armenian immigrant finding success in America, his growth as a business owner and the state of masculinity in the world. Bedros Fit Body Boot Camp is listed as one of the top 500 fastest growing franchises. This success makes Bedros seem like he has always had everything totally under control but there was a time when he was constantly attacked by waves of anxiety filled with thoughts of loosing everyone or being found out he was a fake or a phony. Through a lot of work on himself he determined a path to healing that he outlines in his Wall Street Journal best seller, Man Up and was the inspiration to creating the Modern Day Knight Project (MDK Project) and the Squire Program.
This podcast is presented by Black Rifle Coffee Use code BLASTOFF25 for 25% off Salt Strong Insiders Club: https://bit.ly/RowlandMembership 1st Phorm Nutrition and Supplements: https://1stphorm.com/?a_aid=Tomrowland If you have questions or suggestions for the show you can text Tom at 1 305-930-7346 This episode has been brought to you by Waypoint TV.Waypoint is the ultimate outdoor network featuring streaming of full-length fishing and hunting television shows, short films and instructional content, a social media network, Podcast Network. Waypoint is available on Roku, Samsung Smart TV, Amazon Fire TV, Apple TV, Chromecast, Android TV, IoS devices, Android Devices and at www.waypointtv.com all for FREE! Join the Waypoint Army by following them on Instagram at the following accounts @waypointtv @waypointfish @waypointsalt @waypointboating @waypointhunt @waypointoutdoorcollective Find over 150 full episodes of Saltwater Experience on Waypoint You can follow Tom Rowland on Instagram @tom_rowland and find all episodes and show notes at Tomrowlandpodcast.com Learn more about Tom's Television shows by visiting their websites: Saltwater Experience Into the Blue Sweetwater Contact Tom through email: Podcast@saltwaterexperience.com

programme.title: On Deck
programme.desc:
For someone like Capt. Cory who's out on the water most days of the year, it's easy to notice the little changes that show the stress on an ecosystem. Whether that's subtle movements of fish from lingering red tide blooms or large-scale impacts from high-volume Lak Okeechobee discharges, he sees it all, and he's ready for things to change. "I wish we would get to a point where we really put our foot down and do something about it before it's too late."
Watch this episode to learn more about what's going on and to see why Capt. Cory is so passionate about fighting to protect the places he loves. Visit https://captainsforcleanwater.org to join the fight.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP heads to the river looking to trick wary clearwater Steelheads with nothing but artificials.

programme.title: Gale Force Twins
programme.desc: The cobia migration is happening now and we want to show you our favorite ways to fish for and land these crab eating mud sharks! Our preferred method for targeting these fish is to anchor on a wreck in the Gulf of Mexico in at least 20 ft of water off the Florida Keys. We put out knocker rigs with pinfish and crabs, flat lines with pinfish and wire rigs with blue runners in case we hook into a kingfish or shark. This time of year we usually don't have to wait very long for a bite but if it's slow we will work on catching snappers and blue runners while waiting for that big fish

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: Host Ryan McVinney takes Boat Trader fans on an indepth exploration of Florida flats fishing deep in the backcountry of Islamorada. Featuring Captain Eric Lund, a Wall Street Broker turned backcountry fishing guide, this episode reveals the key design features of the worlds best flats skiffs and how they are built for targeting some of the most exciting sportfish species on the planet. Also, covered are bay boats and their versatility for families exploring Floridas coastal waterways, along with a detailed study of fish species and wildlife in the region. Some of the areas most beautiful and secret locales show why Islamorada has earned the nickname of the Sportfish Capital of The World.

programme.desc: Learn about the Buffalo fish, and how its different from Carp. The guys from AMS Bowfishing put 80 plus pound Buffs in the boat.

programme.title: Barbed
programme.desc: What is a Silver Carp? Where do they live and how can bow fisherman keep them under control.

programme.title: Western Obsessions
programme.desc: In the episode of Western Obsessions TV. Kurt heads to Zimbabwe on a hunt of a lifetime! This episode is the second out of a three episode series in this episode Kurt goes after Impala and runs into a few obstacles in the pursuit. Please watch the other two episodes to find out what other animals Kurt bags on his hunt of a lifetime in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: Western Obsessions
programme.desc: In this episode of Western Obsessions TV, Kurt heads to Zimbabwe on a hunt of a lifetime! This episode is the first out of a three episode series. In this first episode Kurt takes down a mature Kudu and they have a meal of a lifetime after. Please watch the other two episodes to find out what other animals Kurt bags on his hunt of a lifetime in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Mark invites Kenneth to his farm in Kansas during archery season. Both hunters set out in pursuit of a whitetail with friends and family in camp.

programme.title: Struttinbuck
programme.desc: Brandon and Heath Strat off the year down at Hunt FE Hill in Texas chasing whitetail.

programme.title: Behind the Season
programme.desc: Episode 5 After Kenneth and Matt rejoin the boys, its off to go pack out Marks giant brown bear. Before leaving camp, an unwelcome guest crashes the party and Kenneth makes him pay

programme.title: Behind the Season
programme.desc: Episode 2 Facing multiple days of difficult weather, Marks luck changes when a brown bear is spotted walking up the beach and right toward camp!

programme.title: Canadian Whitetail
programme.desc: After Taking a 200" Deer her last time out we all wondered what was next for Rochelle. This week, we find out as she hunts a HEAVY old buck

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: The Backwoods Life team kicks off early season in Georgia. They've got whitetail bucks patterned and are hoping to get the season started right!

programme.title: No Limits
programme.desc: Alexis and Brian are hunting with their good friends at Limcroma Safaris in South Africa in pursuit of Black Death.

programme.title: Wild Yukon
programme.desc: Brent, Greg's father, is charging hard in his seventies. He's looking for his second Dall's Sheep. Can they connect?

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: This week Mark hits the half way point by harvesting 6 more species while in Sonora, Mexico. Sonora may be known for giant mule deer, but Mark makes an example of just how productive the waterfowl hunting can be as well. This hunt has it all. Flocks of 100+ Pintails over decoys, Pacific Brant on the Sea of Cortez, Ring-necks in the fog and even a jump shoot for Coot.

programme.title: Hunting With HECS
programme.desc: Join us this week as we hunt giant Utah bulls with John Dudley from Nock On Nation. Then well finish up the season chasing screaming bulls in the mountains of Oregon.

programme.title: Unchartered New Orleans
programme.desc: The finale of Unchartered New Orleans, finds Jon B, Alex Peric, and Lawson Lindsey venturing to Hopedale on some tips from a few local anglers. Without a guide the guys are on the hunt for Redfish in the marsh. And then the tides turn...

programme.title: Sweetwater
programme.desc: Miles Burghoff meets up with fellow Pro Circuit angler Dakota Ebare to hit the waters of Sam Rayburn Reservoir

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Captain Jonathan Moss teams up with Capt. Matt Graves for some near shore reef fishing.

programme.title: Silver Kings
programme.desc: Good friends Capt. Jared Raskob and Capt. A.J. See set out on a mission to catch enough Snapper for a big ole family fish fry.

programme.title: Guidelines
programme.desc: Jay and his wife Amy set out for an afternoon of Tarpon fishing and battle some giants.

programme.title: Guidelines
programme.desc: A look inside the new Maverick Boat Group Factory in Ft. Pierce, FL.

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode Captain Brandon Branch decided to go back to his roots and fish with a long time friend Laremy Strickland. They've been fishing together for over 10 years now and on this episode they'll be competing to see who can catch the biggest bag.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground with Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: Nick is joined by legendary frontman guitarist Dean Ween aka Mickey Melchiondo and Capt. Pat Murphy to hit the Jersey grounds to fluke fish and talk rock star passions.

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: Host Ryan McVinney takes Boat Trader fans on an indepth exploration of Florida flats fishing deep in the backcountry of Islamorada. Featuring Captain Eric Lund, a Wall Street Broker turned backcountry fishing guide, this episode reveals the key design features of the worlds best flats skiffs and how they are built for targeting some of the most exciting sportfish species on the planet. Also, covered are bay boats and their versatility for families exploring Floridas coastal waterways, along with a detailed study of fish species and wildlife in the region. Some of the areas most beautiful and secret locales show why Islamorada has earned the nickname of the Sportfish Capital of The World.

programme.title: ConQuest 200
programme.desc: Join Doug and Karen Roberts on their deer farm in Michigan during whitetail birthing season.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by young up and coming guide Anthony Vargas, who puts them on a wide variety of game fish in the Keys backcountry.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike fishes a tournament in Crystal River with his wife and Captain Mario.

programme.title: HuntStand Pro Tips & Gear
programme.desc: It's one of the most prominent debates among bowhunters, and now the HuntStand team weighs in on the ups and downs of fixed and mechanical broadheads. What type of head is right for your bowhunting setup? You decide.

programme.title: Two Conchs Fishing Camp
programme.desc: Join the Two Conchs Sportfishing TV team in the Florida Keys and learn how to cast net ballyhoo on the reef. Also learn about how to catch mutton snapper, yellowtail snapper and more.

programme.title: Two Conchs Fishing Camp
programme.desc: Join the Two Conchs Sportfishing TV team in the Florida Keys to learn how to fish the reefs wrecks for mutton snapper, african pompano and more in the wintertime.

programme.title: Unplugged
programme.desc: Alice in Chains performs acoustic versions of "Nutshell," "Brother," "Down in a Hole" and others.

programme.title: Jack Johnson: iTunes Festival - Live at Roundhouse London
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Jack Johnson featuring unforgettable version of his hits: 'Better Together', 'Good People', 'Taylor' and many more.

programme.title: Sia: Live at the Metro Theatre
programme.desc: The Australian-born singer-songwriter Sia Kate Isobelle Furler, simply known as Sia, is one of the most unique artists in today's popular music scene. However, her path to stardom has been nothing but rocky. Only after numerous musical experimentations, where the singer tried to establish herself in her home country as well as United Kingdom, Sia finally blossomed in United States around the second decade of the 21st century.

programme.title: The Black Keys: Live at Austin City Limits
Apple Music Festival
programme.desc: Annual music festival with 62 bands performing over 31 days.

programme.title: Echoes Series
programme.desc: A set from Nilfer Yanya includes the songs "The Florist," "Angels" and "The Unordained."

programme.title: George Michael -- Live in London
programme.desc: The singer performs at Earls Court Exhibition Centre in London; songs include "Father Figure," "Faith," "Amazing" and "Freedom 90."

programme.title: Tony Bennett - Duets II: The Great Performances
programme.desc: The hits from the CD Duets II are beautifully recorded on the videos of studio recordings on the new Blu-Ray, Duets II - The Great Performances.

programme.title: Various Artists - Qello Concerts' Best
programme.desc: A selection of UK artists from the Qello Concerts' library.

programme.title: Metallica: Orion Festival
programme.desc: Filmed at Orion Festival, Atlantic City, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular live experience from start to finish. Classic Metallica featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'One', 'Master Of Puppets', 'Sad But True', 'Seek & Destroy' and many more.

programme.title: Arcade Fire - Live at Glastonbury Festival
programme.desc: Arcade Fire performs at the Glastonbury Festival of Contemporary Performing Arts, the second largest open-air music festival in the world; known mainly for its musical performances, it also features attractions of dance, humor, theater, and circus.

programme.title: Radiohead - Live at Glastonbury Festival
programme.desc: Glastonbury Festival of Contemporary Performing Arts, is the second largest open-air music festival in the world. Known mainly for its musical performances, it also features attractions of dance, humor, theater, circus. Featuring: Radiohead.

programme.title: Korn: Live at Brixton Academy
programme.desc: Korn is an American nu metal band from Bakersfield, California, formed in 1993. This Korn performance was filmed live at Brixton Academy in London on May 2, 2014.

programme.title: Lady Gaga - iTunes Festival - Live in London
programme.desc: Lady Gaga's performance at the iTunes Festival in London on September 1, 2013 marks the superstar's first full concert since the The Born This Way Ball.

programme.title: Opera & Ouvertures
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of the best-known opera arias and overtures by the likes of W. A. Mozart, Giuseppe Verdi and Giacomo Puccini, performed by world-renowned singers at prestigious opera houses.

programme.title: Chamber Music
programme.desc: A selection of intimate works for piano or chamber music ensembles.

programme.title: Best of Ballet and Dance
programme.desc: Celebrated ballets and performances.

programme.title: Popular Classical
programme.desc: The joy of the world's most popular melodies.

programme.title: Discover
programme.desc: Classical music treasures from popular cross-over genres, including George Gershwin's jazzy compositions and Ennio Morricone's atmospheric film music.

programme.title: Concertos & Symphonies
programme.desc: A well-curated selection of orchestral movements from the greatest symphonies and concertos by the likes of Beethoven, Mozart, Tchaikovsky, and Brahms.

programme.title: Masterpieces
programme.desc: The world's most celebrated orchestras and soloists perform Beethoven's monumental Ninth Symphony, Grieg's Peer Gynt Suite, Bach's Brandenburg Concertos, and other enduring classical masterpieces.

programme.title: Stunning Soloists
programme.desc: The world's greatest instrumentalists showcase their superlative musicality and skill. Enjoy breath-taking performances by virtuoso musicians including Lang Lang, Janine Jansen, and Daniil Trifonov!

programme.title: Piano Masters
programme.desc: Tune in for two hours of classical piano performances and relish the classical keyboard's endlessly varied repertoire: from Frdric Chopin's enchanting Nocturnes to Beethoven's and Mozart's imaginative sonatas.
